sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106573" key="u(kero/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑκερός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἑκυρός</ref> </xr> (with vowel-transposition), Keil-Premerstein <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Zweiter Bericht</tr_> Nos.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg004:146" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">146</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg004:151" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">151</biblScope> </bibl>; fem. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑκερά</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0545.tlg004:232" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">232</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
